# Science & Technology — 1987

Discoveries, inventions, and technological breakthroughs of 1987.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index:science-technology — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [Supernova 1987A](supernova-1987a.md) | A core-collapse supernova in the Large Magellanic Cloud — the brightest seen from Earth since 1604 and the first source of directly detected supernova neutrinos. |
| [DNA Fingerprinting Enters the Courtroom](dna-fingerprinting.md) | On November 13, 1987 Robert Melias became the first person in the world convicted using DNA evidence, opening a new era in forensic science. |
| [Microsoft Windows 2.0 (December 9, 1987)](windows-2.md) | Microsoft's second graphical environment introduces overlapping windows, desktop icons, and a protected-mode Windows/386 variant, triggering the landmark Apple v. Microsoft "look and feel" lawsuit. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index:science-technology -->
